title: ModalityDefinition
description: Plan §A.S5 — schema for `config/modalities/<id>.yaml`. The single source of truth for modality definition: classifier keywords, EDAM IRI tuple, taxonomy/archetype routing, fixture corpus rows. Replaces the per-modality block in `modality-keywords.yaml`. The `ModalityRegistry` loader (Plan §A.S5) validates each YAML against this schema before deserialization. The file stem must equal the declared id.

schema_version.description: Schema-layout version for this modality manifest. Registered in `crates/core/src/migration` so an emitted package referencing an older modality schema surfaces `BlockerKind::SchemaVersionMismatch` at load time. Bump on breaking layout changes; additive optional fields stay on the same version.

id.description: Stable modality id (e.g. `bulk_rnaseq`, `single_cell_rnaseq`). Lowercase + underscores. The composer uses this as the cache key for archetype matching.

display_name.description: Human-readable name surfaced in SME-facing UI.

keywords.description: Substring keywords the classifier scans the SME's normalized intake text against. Empty list is the fallback shape (`generic_omics`).

edam_topic.description: EDAM topic IRI characterising the modality.

edam_operation.description: EDAM operation IRI for the modality's primary computation.

taxonomy_path.description: Plan Stage 9 sunset target — path (relative to config/) of the legacy taxonomy YAML for this modality. The keyword classifier loads this when no archetype match is found. Stage 9 prunes this field after the composer-native archetype path becomes the default.

archetype_id.description: Optional composer-native archetype id this modality maps to. When set, the composer fast-path can route directly without classifier-tie-break.

fixture_corpus_rows.description: Names of fixture corpus rows that exercise this modality. Used by `playwright_eval/corpus.rs::infer_modality` to map fixture id → modality without hardcoded match arms.

interpretation_policy_override.description: Optional path of a per-modality interpretation policy that overrides the default. When omitted, the loader uses the project-class-level policy.

prompt_addendum_path.description: Optional path to a per-modality prompt addendum the conversation crate appends after the project-class block. Most modalities don't need this; reserve for modalities with strong claim-boundary or vocabulary-fence requirements.

semantic_equivalence_bounds.description: Per-modality numeric tolerances that define when two independent runs of the analysis are considered semantically equivalent. Used by the claim verifier and the evaluation rubric scorer to gate PAR-26-040 §G2 reproducibility claims.

metric.description: Metric name, e.g. log2fc_abs_delta, ari, jaccard, vcf_concordance, spearman_rho.

operator.description: Comparison direction: the observed value must satisfy `observed <operator> threshold`.

applies_to.description: Optional glob-style artifact pattern relative to the package root, e.g. 'results/tables/de_*.csv'. When omitted the bound applies to any artifact that exposes the metric.

rationale.description: Free-text rationale, e.g. 'Grant §G2 bulk-RNA DE bound'.
